# RouteForce

> RouteForce is native Salesforce route planning and route optimization software for field sales teams.

RouteForce helps field teams plan routes, visualize accounts / opportunities / leads on a map, create Salesforce events, review route history, and execute field visits without leaving Salesforce.

## Primary pages
- https://routeforce.app/
- https://routeforce.app/en/
- https://routeforce.app/es/

- https://routeforce.app/docs/cgv.html
- https://routeforce.app/docs/dpa.html

## Key facts
- Native Salesforce software
- Built for field sales teams
- Multi-object maps for accounts, opportunities, and leads
- Route optimization inside Salesforce
- Salesforce event creation from planned routes
- 14-day free trial
- €599/month excluding tax for the whole Salesforce org
- No per-user pricing
- Primary hosting in France
